name: Fake Compliance Report
text1: Small discrepancy, likely a bookkeeping error. Facility cooperates with re-audit.
text2: Systematic fraud. Hundreds of chips unaccounted for across multiple facilities.
image-prompt: An auditor discovering falsified records, spreadsheets with red highlighted discrepancies, stacks of paperwork on a desk, a rubber stamp reading APPROVED on fraudulent documents, investigative atmosphere, digital painting, no text
